body_text.description: Main readable text extracted from the source, excluding separately captured captions, figures, and diagram transcriptions where practical.

caption_text.description: Caption text extracted from figures, images, tables, screenshots, or other labeled visual elements.

figure_text.description: Text detected inside figures, screenshots, charts, or embedded images.

diagram_transcription.description: Human- or machine-readable transcription of diagram structure, flows, labels, relationships, or other non-linear visual content.
